title: As Argentina Holds Up Falklands Banner on Defeating England, Here’s What to Know About the War
summary_full: Argentina and Britain fought a bloody war over the Falkland Islands in 1982. Decades later, the dispute suffuses matches between England and Argentina.
summary_public: Argentina and Britain fought a bloody war over the Falkland Islands in 1982. Decades later, the dispute suffuses matches between England and Argentina.
